---
title: "Projects"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  id: project-listing
  contents: projects.yml
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, description, categories, date]
  sort: "date desc"
  grid-columns: 2
  image-height: "180px"
---

```{=html}
<section style="padding: 4rem 0 2rem;">
  <div class="section-label">Portfolio</div>
  <h1>Projects</h1>
  <hr class="neon-rule">
  <p style="max-width:55ch; font-size:1.05rem;">
    A collection of analytical and technical projects built across my degree.
    Each one started with a question — the code came after.
  </p>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<div class="card-grid" style="padding-bottom: 5rem;">

  <a href="data-analysis.qmd" class="project-card">
    <div class="card-tag">Data Analysis · Python</div>
    <h3>Exploratory Sales Analysis</h3>
    <p>
      Cleaned and explored a retail sales dataset using Pandas. Found seasonal
      patterns and top-performing SKUs through visual EDA and grouped aggregations.
    </p>
    <div class="pill-group">
      <span class="pill pill-neon">Python</span>
      <span class="pill">Pandas</span>
      <span class="pill">Plotly</span>
      <span class="pill">EDA</span>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a href="machine-learning.qmd" class="project-card">
    <div class="card-tag">Machine Learning</div>
    <h3>Customer Churn Predictor</h3>
    <p>
      Trained a Random Forest classifier on a telecom dataset to predict churn.
      Explored feature importance and evaluated performance with a confusion matrix.
    </p>
    <div class="pill-group">
      <span class="pill pill-neon">Scikit-learn</span>
      <span class="pill">Pandas</span>
      <span class="pill">Random Forest</span>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a href="dashboard.qmd" class="project-card">
    <div class="card-tag">Dashboard · Visualisation</div>
    <h3>Interactive KPI Dashboard</h3>
    <p>
      Built an interactive multi-panel dashboard with Plotly Express to track
      business KPIs — revenue, churn, and acquisition costs — with live filtering.
    </p>
    <div class="pill-group">
      <span class="pill pill-neon">Plotly</span>
      <span class="pill">Python</span>
      <span class="pill">BI</span>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a href="business-strategy.qmd" class="project-card">
    <div class="card-tag">Business Strategy</div>
    <h3>Market Entry Analysis</h3>
    <p>
      Data-driven market entry analysis for a hypothetical SaaS product.
      Combines Porter's Five Forces with publicly available market size data.
    </p>
    <div class="pill-group">
      <span class="pill">Strategy</span>
      <span class="pill">Research</span>
      <span class="pill">Frameworks</span>
    </div>
  </a>

</div>
```
